backend/main.mo: Main backend actor implementing product management (CRUD operations with admin-only access), user profile management, and role-based authorization using AccessControl mixin with Map-based storage for products and user profiles.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting two high-confidence features related to investigating and fixing loading timeout issues in LoadingTimeout component, useQueries hooks, and React Query state handling across ProductBrowse and AdminProducts pages.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Comprehensive summaries of all frontend files including components, pages, hooks, and configuration files, highlighting LoadingTimeout integration (15s timeout), React Query retry configuration (2 retries with 1s delay), and improved error handling across the application.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS styles defining custom OKLCH color system with warm neutrals, earth tones, and comprehensive design tokens for light and dark themes including sidebar, chart, and destructive color variables.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point with page title "Fashion Forum" and root div for React application mounting.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Main application component configuring TanStack Router with routes for product browsing, detail, and admin pages, plus ProfileSetup modal logic that waits for identity initialization and profile query completion before displaying.
frontend/src/components/AccessDeniedScre: Access denied screen component displaying a shield alert icon and message for non-admin users attempting to access admin-only pages with a return button.
frontend/src/components/CategoryFilter.t: Category filter component rendering rounded pill buttons for "All" and individual categories with active state styling based on selected category.
frontend/src/components/CategoryImageSec: Collapsible category section component with clickable thumbnail that toggles visibility of 7 product images in a responsive grid with hover effects and smooth animations.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Main layout wrapper with sticky header containing Fashion Forum branding, Pinterest icon, user profile display, admin navigation link for authorized users, authentication controls, and footer with Caffeine attribution.
frontend/src/components/LoadingTimeout.t: A React component that displays a loading spinner and shows a timeout alert with retry option if loading exceeds a configurable timeout duration (default 15 seconds).
frontend/src/components/ProductCard.tsx: A product card component that displays product image, name, category badge, and price with hover effects, and shows a Pinterest icon if the product has an associated pin.
frontend/src/components/ProductForm.tsx: A form component using react-hook-form for creating or editing products with fields for name, description, price, category, image URL, and optional Pinterest pin ID.
frontend/src/components/ProfileSetup.tsx: A modal dialog component that prompts new users to enter their name on first visit, using a mutation hook to save the profile with loading and error states.
frontend/src/components/SwipeableGallery: An image gallery component with swipe gesture support (touch and mouse), navigation arrows, thumbnail indicators, and a "Look Out" button linking to Meesho affiliate URL.
frontend/src/components/WatchProductSect: A promotional section component displaying a carousel of watch product images with a clickable "Look Out" icon linking to a Meesho affiliate product page.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: A React Query hook that creates and manages an authenticated or anonymous backend actor based on Internet Identity authentication state, initializing access control with an admin token from URL parameters.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: A React context provider and hook for managing Internet Identity authentication, handling login/logout flows, identity persistence, and providing authentication status states throughout the application.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for fetching and mutating user profiles, products, and admin status, with caching, retry logic, and toast notifications.
frontend/src/hooks/useSwipeGesture.ts: Custom hook that handles touch and mouse swipe gestures with configurable left/right callbacks and threshold detection.
frontend/src/index.css: Global CSS with Tailwind setup, custom CSS variables for light/dark themes using warm neutral and earth-tone color palettes, and font configurations for Playfair Display and Inter.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that sets up React Query, Internet Identity provider, and renders the root App component.
frontend/src/pages/AdminProducts.tsx: Admin page for managing products with CRUD operations, access control checks, table display, and modal forms for adding/editing products.
frontend/src/pages/ProductBrowse.tsx: Main product browsing page with hero banner, category filtering, swipeable gallery, promotional sections, and grid display of filtered products.
frontend/src/pages/ProductDetail.tsx: Product detail page displaying full product information, image, pricing, description, and Pinterest link with loading and error states.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for extracting, storing, and managing URL parameters from both regular query strings and hash-based routing, with sessionStorage persistence support.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining custom color schemes using OKLCH, typography, container queries, animations, and design tokens for a component library.
project_state.json: Project metadata tracking features and issues related to resolving a loading timeout problem, including React Query state handling and backend actor initialization concerns.
